summary: Iteration 2 regression run after wiring real audio infrastructure (expo-audio playback, mic recorder VOX, PTT recorder). Tested at https://group-ride-audio.preview.emergentagent.com on mobile viewport 412x900. All 11 previously-passing behaviors still pass. NEW: 'mic-vox-toggle' inside duck-system-card renders correctly on web with aria-disabled=true and the sub-text 'Mic not available on this device' (because Platform.OS === 'web' sets micVoxSupported=false). Tapping the disabled mic toggle does not crash the app. Tracks: title cycle Neon Highway -> Pedal Sequence -> Headwind Hymn confirmed; first track-artist now reads 'SoundHelix Demo' confirming new bundled audio data is wired up. Persistence verified across reload (volume 30%, vox 75, intercom-mode PTT, duck-depth deep all restored — duck-depth-deep visual highlight confirmed in screenshot). 0 console errors captured during the run.
critical_code_review_comments: useTrackPlayer cleanly uses expo-audio's useAudioPlayer + replace() on skip with reactive volume = userVolume * duckFactor — good real-time duck behavior.
DuckSystemCard correctly gates the mic toggle with `disabled={!micVoxSupported}` and shows fallback copy on web — exactly per spec.
audioModeSetRef guard prevents redundant setAudioModeAsync calls; player.loop=true reasonable for prototype.
No 700+ line files; testIDs preserved on all interactive elements; no MongoDB/_id concerns (frontend-only app).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend-only Expo app. Real audio playback + mic VOX + PTT recorder cannot be validated on web preview (browser autoplay restriction + Platform.OS==='web' disables mic intentionally); these must be validated on a physical device via Expo Go. On web, mic-vox-toggle MUST show aria-disabled=true and sub-text 'Mic not available on this device'. All 11 baseline UI behaviors from iteration_1 still pass. New testID added: 'mic-vox-toggle' inside duck-system-card. First track artist is now 'SoundHelix Demo' (was 'Velo Voice Pro' or similar in iteration 1). Track titles unchanged: Neon Highway, Pedal Sequence, Headwind Hymn.
